positive: A highly detailed, minimalist illustration featuring a stylized mountain range silhouette viewed from above, with a single, vibrant sun rising behind the peaks. The foreground should contain clean, abstract elements like scattered crescent moons and stylized constellations, giving a sense of cosmic wonder. Use strong contrast between deep navy blues, ethereal lavender, burnt orange, and gold accents. The style should be modern, clean vector art, optimized for screen printing on apparel. Composition must be centered and symmetrical for maximum print impact. Minimal background noise, clean lines, flat design feel, suitable for apparel print.
negative: blurry, noise, text, logo, signature, watermark, lowres, amateur, blurry lines, artifacts, poor anatomy, extra limbs, copyright, celebrity, realistic photo
